column1: 「彼女の誕生日っていつだっけ?」「来週の月曜日だよ。」
column2: 「かのじょのたんじょうひっていつだっけ?」「らいしゅうのげつようひだよ。」
column3: 'When was her birthday again?' 'It's next Monday.'
column4: っけ (what was it again? / was it...? — recalling forgotten info)
column5: Sentence + っけ? (seeking confirmation of something half-remembered)
column6: used at the end of a question to indicate you're trying to recall something you've forgotten; 'what was it again?'
column8: っけ = recalling forgotten info (casual); かな = wondering/uncertainty; でしたっけ = polite version; よね = confirming something you believe
